name: style-writer
description: Write content using stored writing styles from the writing-styles/ collection. Use when the user wants to write in a specific voice, apply a stored style, list available writing styles, or evaluate text against a style rubric.

interface.longDescription: Write content using stored writing styles from the writing-styles/ collection. Use when the user wants to write in a specific voice, apply a stored style, list available writing styles, or evaluate text against a style rubric.
